title: Political Activities
doc_html:
§20. Political Activities

            Section 20. Article XIV, Section 15.1, Paragraph 34 of the Constitution of 1921 is retained and continued in force and effect.
doc_text:
§20.  Political Activities
Section 20.  Article XIV, Section 15.1, Paragraph 34 of the Constitution of 1921 is
retained and continued in force and effect.
